nodes.name: Prepare Email Data
nodes.notes: V3.0: Complete email data preparation with template mapping, subject, and sender info

nodes.name: Read Template File
nodes.notes: V5: Complete data property fix - encoding + dataPropertyName for accessible output

nodes.name: Render Template
nodes.notes: V4.0: Updated to read .data instead of .stdout (Read File output)

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO email_logs (
  recipient_email,
  recipient_name,
  subject,
  template_used,
  status,
  sent_at,
  metadata
) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, NOW(), $6)

INSERT INTO email_logs (
  recipient_email,
  recipient_name,
  subject,
  template_used,
  status,
  sent_at,
  error_message,
  metadata
) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, NOW(), $6, $7)

additionalFields.queryParameters: ={{ $('Prepare Email Data').item.json.to }},={{ $('Prepare Email Data').item.json.template_data.name }},={{ $('Prepare Email Data').item.json.subject }},={{ $('Prepare Email Data').item.json.template }},failed,={{ $json.message }},={{ JSON.stringify({ error: $json.message }) }}
